title: logto-io/logto
friendlyTitle: Logto helps apps handle login and permissions
summary: Logto is an open-source authentication and authorization platform for SaaS and AI apps, built around OIDC, OAuth 2.1, multi-tenancy, SSO, and RBAC.
friendlySummary: Logto is an open-source system for user accounts, company accounts, roles, and sign-in.
whyItMatters: Teams building AI products can use it as identity infrastructure instead of stitching together login, organization management, roles, and enterprise SSO from scratch.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can save builders time when adding secure login to AI or SaaS apps.
